mnemonics: DASH: Drill-down, Analyze, Summarize, Highlight for Dashboards
SCORED: Strategic, Comparative, Objectives, Reviewed, Evaluated, Displayed for Scorecards
MOLAP ROLAP HOLAP: Multi-dimensional, Relational, Hybrid OLAP types
keyPoints: Dashboards are graphical, interactive tools for monitoring and analyzing performance metrics.
Scorecards are strategic tools that track performance against specific goals and targets using a score-based system.
OLAP (Online Analytical Processing) enables complex, multidimensional analysis of data stored in the warehouse.
commonMistakes: Confusing dashboards (operational, real-time) with scorecards (strategic, periodic).
Assuming OLAP and OLTP (Online Transaction Processing) are the same or serve the same purpose.
Using the wrong type of OLAP (MOLAP, ROLAP, HOLAP) for a specific data analysis need.
